task.objective: Define the next repository engineering phase boundary after Phase 1 closure as Phase 2 Boundary Definition only, without authorizing Phase 2 implementation or any product delivery surface.

requirements: Commit this MTC as the first artifact on the branch before any authority-bearing current-state record edits.
Update only the authorized current-state records to identify Phase 2 Boundary Definition as the next repository engineering work.
Create a non-implementation boundary plan with allowed planning work, forbidden implementation work, stop conditions, and independent review requirements.
Do not authorize or start Phase 2 implementation.

Do not create or modify production code, contracts, tests, scripts, generated projections, CI, package manifests, product protocols, product semantics, Verdict semantics, Trust semantics, Evidence authority classes, or canonical terminology.
Preserve current product boundaries: no repository inspection, verification execution, target-code execution, adapters, delivery surfaces, model provider behavior, or Inference Zone implementation.
Do not claim product readiness, trusted release, a Proofrail product Verdict, or a complete product runtime.
Require a later valid Machine Task Contract and independent review before any implementation task may begin.
Keep the final diff limited to this MTC, README.md, docs/constitution/product-constitution.md, and docs/plans/active/phase-2-boundary-definition.md.
Any cost, billing, credential, paid cloud, or SaaS prompt stops the task with BLOCKED_COST_RISK.
If local long-run or Codex limit is reached, stop with LIMIT_REACHED.

requiredInvariants: The first branch commit is PHASE2-BOUNDARY-001.
The boundary plan is non-implementation only.
No prohibited product surface or product semantic change is introduced.
No product readiness, trusted release, or product Verdict claim is introduced.

stopConditions: PHASE2-BOUNDARY-001 fails schema or governance validation
Authority-Change Preflight cannot authorize the record updates before edits
Any prohibited implementation or semantic change is needed
Any Phase 2 implementation work is needed or requested inside this task
Any cost, billing, credential, paid cloud, or SaaS prompt appears: BLOCKED_COST_RISK
Local long-run or Codex limit is reached: LIMIT_REACHED
